title: dryopteris eurostotricha
intro: Dryopteris eurostotricha, also known as the Eurasian shield fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Dryopteris eurostotricha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine.
